# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zones (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances availability zones of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all availability zones of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zones" "all" {}

output "zone_names" {
  value = [for z in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zones.all.availability_zones : z.name]
}

# Filter in HCL, e.g. the zones of a given region.
output "fr1_zones" {
  value = [
    for z in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zones.all.availability_zones :
    z.name if startswith(z.name, "fr1-")
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region_id` (String) Filter availability zones by region ID.

### Read-Only

- `availability_zones` (List of Object) The list of availability zones. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--availability_zones))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--availability_zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `availability_zones`

Read-Only:

- `compatible_families` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--availability_zones--compatible_families))
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

- `name` (String)
